Off Calendar Jun-01-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Katherine McCulley's motion to compel responses to interrogatories is taken off calendar, at the request of the moving party. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2006 Off Calendar

Motion To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar May-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Rafal Ofierski, Deputy City Attorney, for defendant and moving party: City and County of San Francisco

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. Plaintiff's representative is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. The request for monetary sanctions is denied as the declaration does not comply with CCP Section 2023.040. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
